persona_note: Happy path — clean bureau, stable salaried income, low exposure.
Self-employed, declared income contradicted by irregular deposits — agents disagree.
Stacked across 5 BNPL providers, utilization over policy cap.
120 days past due — severe delinquency hard rule.
DTI 45% — declines under the v2.1 policy's 40% ceiling, approves once the ceiling moves to 50% in v2.2.
